heading: Regulations
label: 12116 Regulations
text: Not later than 1 year after , the Commission shall issue regulations in an accessible format to carry out this subchapter in accordance with subchapter II of chapter 5 of title 5.July 26, 1990
notes: Effective DateSection effective 24 months after , see , set out as a note under .July 26, 1990section 108 of Pub. L. 101–336section 12111 of this title
